inputs.question: Compare the performance, price, screen, and battery life of phone model X, X2, and XPro. What should I choose when I want extreme battery life?

config.title: Phone Model X Series Performance Comparison

expected.summary: You should choose the **XPro** model for extreme battery life, as it has the highest battery score of **95**, significantly outperforming the X and X2 models.

notes: User asks to 'compare' multiple attributes across several products - classic radar chart scenario. Multiple numeric attributes for each entity (phone model) suit radar visualization well. Also, user asks for a recommendation based on one attribute (battery life), which can be highlighted in the summary.
